hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, re; data=sys.stdin.read(); lines=data.splitlines(); err=[l for l in lines if re.search(r'(ERROR|FAILED|WARNING|Exception|Traceback)', l, re.I)]; tail=lines[-5:] if not err else []; out=err[:30]+tail; [print(l) for l in out]; total=len(lines); shown=len(out); print(f'[filtered: {total} lines => {shown} shown]') if total > shown else None"
python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); blocked=['.env','secrets.yaml']; sys.exit(2) if any(x in p for x in blocked) else sys.exit(0)"
